mapper.select: SELECT duration_type, max_duration FROM gamedb.quest_list WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT map_id, npc_id, area_type, min_x, max_x, min_z, max_z, radius FROM gamedb.quest_list WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT name, quest_book_group_id, short_description, party, pvp, quest_type, min_level, max_level, multiple, wait_time, max_duration, main_quest_id, quest_book_group_rank FROM gamedb.quest_list WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT name FROM gamedb.quest_list WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, monster_id FROM gamedb.quest_list WHERE monster_id > '0'
